name: Calcium carbonate may reduce doxycycline absorption
actions: Separate doxycycline and calcium carbonate administration when possible.
Monitor for reduced doxycycline effect if coadministration cannot be avoided (educational).

rationale: Calcium can chelate doxycycline in the gastrointestinal tract.
Combined use may reduce doxycycline absorption and effectiveness.

explanation_template: {B_name} may reduce absorption of {A_name} through chelation, which can reduce antibiotic effectiveness.
